subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto him who desireth to turn towards the Countenance when he heareth the warbling of the Nightingale upon the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اراد ان یتوجه الی الوجه اذ سمع هدیر العندلیب علی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
